chapter_title.ar: باب فِيهِ نُكَتٌ وَ نُتَفٌ مِنَ التَّنْزِيلِ فِي الْوَلَايَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 108 – Points and pickings from the Revelation regarding the Wilayah

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/ 5)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ رَفَعَهُ

text: هِ تَعَالَى لا أُقْسِمُ بِهذَا الْبَلَدِ. وَ أَنْتَ حِلٌّ بِهذَا الْبَلَدِ. وَ والِدٍ وَ ما وَلَدَ قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَ مَا وَلَدَ مِنَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abdullah,

(It has been narrated) raising it regarding the Words of the Exalted [90:1] Indeed! I swear by this city [90:2] And you are a dweller of this city [90:3] And a father and what he begot. Heasws said: ‘Amir Al-Momineenasws and what heasws begot from the Imamsasws’.
en.sarwar: 11. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ali ibn Muhammad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Abdallah in a marfu‘ manner about the words of Allah, the Most High. “I do not (need to) swear by this town (Mecca) [90:1] in which you are now living [90:2] or by the great father and his wonderful son . .” [90:3] The Imam (a.s.) said, “It refers to Amir al-Mu’minin (a.s.) and the Imams from his descendants.”
